data.content: Validated work/foolery-02d0 at 4c2a5e36a0e5 for the natural-id detail header behavior: the lightbox shows the natural beat id first and preserves alias copy chips in the form 'proj-1234 | proj-5678.3 (alias)'. Focused tests for beat detail and knots backend passed, and project sanity gates completed in the dedicated worktree: bun run lint (warnings only, no errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
